title: Investment Decision Lab
description: Cover slide. Eyebrow plus headline plus a subtitle introducing the tool, with a sample BUILD endpoint and side-by-side input/output JSON blocks showing a client profile becoming a strategic allocation.

title: Three tools, three answers
description: Problem framing. Three numbered failure modes of the status quo: black-box optimisers, stale spreadsheets, dashboards that don't talk to clients.

title: From risk score to ISIN
description: Quick Start narrative in three numbered steps: set the profile, receive an allocation across nine asset classes, get the implementable order ticket with named ISIN.

title: Not a model. An order ticket.
description: Implementation slide showing seven of the 16 hand-curated UCITS ETFs in a structured monospace table with asset class, fund name, ISIN, weight and TER.

title: Correlation-aware risk
description: Risk metrics slide. Big σp = √(wᵀ·Σ·w) formula in a code block on the left, list of metrics produced (vol, Sharpe, VaR/ES, contribution-to-risk, editable correlation matrix) on the right.

title: Stress test the story
description: Six historical crisis windows with portfolio drawdowns on the left, a 10,000-path Monte Carlo percentile output as JSON on the right.

title: See through every fund
description: Look-through slide. Top single-name exposures (NVDA, AAPL, MSFT, ...) on the left, sector aggregation bar list on the right.

title: Built for the second look
description: Methodology / governance slide. Four cards: every formula on screen, every input editable, bilingual EN/DE, no accounts and no tracking (frontend-only).

title: Open the Lab
description: Closing CTA slide. Centered headline and subtitle inviting the reader to open the tool, two action chips, and a stats footer (16 ETFs, 6 stress windows, ~3,000 underlyings).
